zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine de Hethersett於大約1275年出生在英國素福爾可望福德時，她的父親Sir John de Hethersett36歲，母親Margaret Braunche30歲。她於1305年與Walter Norwich在紐西蘭坎特布瑞斯托克結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1343年10月之前在英國諾福爾可諾維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine de Hethersett于大约1275年出生在英国素福爾可望福德时，她的父亲Sir John de Hethersett36岁，母亲Margaret Braunche30岁。她于1305年与Walter Norwich在新西兰坎特布瑞斯托克结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1343年10月之前在英国諾福爾可諾維其。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: Pet form of Katherine , derived from the pet form Kit + the hypocoristic suffix -y. It is also used as an independent given name.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine de Hethersett was born about 1275, in Wangford, Suffolk, England, her father, Sir John de Hethersett, was 36 and her mother, Margaret Braunche, was 30. She married Walter Norwich in 1305, in Stoke, Canterbury, New Zealand. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died before October 1343, in Norwich, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine de Hethersett est née environ 1275, à Wangford, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Hethersett, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Margaret Braunche, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Walter Norwich en 1305, à Stoke, Canterbury, Nouvelle-Zélande. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée avant octobre 1343, à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine de Hethersett um 1275 in Wangford, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Hethersett 36 und ihre Mutter Margaret Braunche 30. Sie hat 1305 in Stoke, Canterbury, Neuseeland Walter Norwich geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb vor Oktober 1343 in Norwich, Norfolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine de Hethersett è nata il circa 1275 nel Wangford, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Sir John de Hethersett, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Margaret Braunche, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Walter Norwich nel 1305, nel Stoke, Canterbury, Nuova Zelanda. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì prima del ottobre 1343, nel Norwich, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine de Hethersettが約1275年にイギリススフォルクワングフォードで生まれた時，父Sir John de Hethersettは36歳，母Margaret Brauncheは30歳であった。1305年にニュージーランドカンテルブリーストクでWalter Norwichと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1343年10月以前にイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine de Hethersett(이)가 대략 1275년 영국 수폴크 왕퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Hethersett(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Braunche(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1305년 뉴질랜드 캉르버이 스토크에서 Walter Norwich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1343년 10월 이전 영국 노르폴크 노위치에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine de Hethersett nasceu aproximadamente 1275, em Wangford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Hethersett, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Braunche, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Walter Norwich em 1305, em Stoke, Canterbury, Nova Zelândia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu antes outubro de 1343, em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine de Hethersett родилась около 1275 г. в местности вангфорд, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John de Hethersett было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Braunche, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter Norwich в 1305 г. в местности сток, кантирбури, Новая Зеландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла перед октябрь 1343 г. в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия.

sm.about 1275–before October 1343: e tusa o le 1275–a'e le'I oo le Oketopa 1343

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Catherine de Hethersett nació aproximadamente 1275, en Wangford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John de Hethersett, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Margaret Braunche, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Walter Norwich en 1305, en Stoke, Canterbury, Nueva Zelanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió antes de octubre de 1343, en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
